}

question: how old is the current president of north korea?
query:
#MANUAL SPARQL
PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {
  ns:m.05b7q ns:government.governmental_jurisdiction.governing_officials ?y1 .  # North Korea
  ?y1 ns:government.government_position_held.office_holder ?y2 ;
      ns:government.government_position_held.basic_title ns:m.060c4 . # President
  ?y2 ns:people.person.date_of_birth ?x .

# Current
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y1 ns:government.government_position_held.to ?sk0} || 
           EXISTS {?y1 ns:government.government_position_held.to ?sk1 . 
                   FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk1) > "2015-08-10"^^xsd:dateTime) })

# Alive (Kim Il-sung remains the "Eternal President of the Republic" forever...)
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y2 ns:people.deceased_person.date_of_death ?sk0} || 
           EXISTS {?y2 ns:people.deceased_person.date_of_death ?sk1 . 
                   FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk1) > "2015-08-10"^^xsd:dateTime) })
}

question: who succeeded william mckinley as president?
query:
#MANUAL SPARQL
PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT  ?x
WHERE {
  ns:m.060d2 ns:government.government_office_or_title.office_holders ?y1 .  # President of the United States
  ?y1 ns:government.government_position_held.office_holder ns:m.083p7 ; # William McKinley
      ns:government.government_position_held.to ?to .

  ns:m.060d2 ns:government.government_office_or_title.office_holders ?y2 .  # President of the United States
  ?y2 ns:government.government_position_held.office_holder ?x ;
      ns:government.government_position_held.to ?from .
  
  FILTER(xsd:dateTime(?from) - xsd:dateTime(?to) > 0)
}
ORDER BY xsd:dateTime(?from)
LIMIT 1

question: who is the coach of inter milan now?
query:
PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {
FILTER (?x != ns:m.03x6m)
FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) || lang(?x) = '' || langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))
ns:m.03x6m ns:sports.sports_team.coaches ?y .
?y ns:sports.sports_team_coach_tenure.coach ?x .
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_coach_tenure.from ?sk0} || 
EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_coach_tenure.from ?sk1 . 
FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk1) <= "2015-08-10"^^xsd:dateTime) })
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_coach_tenure.to ?sk2} || 
EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_coach_tenure.to ?sk3 . 
FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk3) >= "2015-08-10"^^xsd:dateTime) })
}
